artPrompt: A poisoned creek winds down through the wide frame, its slow water glowing faint sickly bioluminescence between rusted culverts and litter-choked banks, mutant overgrowth crowding the murky-green flow under a bruised stormy sky. No figure, only the luminous trickle. One cold storm-light catches the creek's eerie glow against deep shadow, rust-red mud at its edges, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Toxic Runoff Creek
text:
Toxic Runoff Creek enters the battlefield tapped.
When Toxic Runoff Creek enters the battlefield, it deals 1 damage to you. You drank from the creek. Everyone drank from the creek. The creek was a mistake.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.
flavorText: It glows a little at night. The town calls it 'the pretty part of the walk.'
